def negative_constructor_reads_global_config_inline():
    rule_id = "constructor_reads_global_config_inline"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag classes whose constructors pull environment variables or global config directly instead of receiving normalized dependencies."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
